texto: And then, there was no longer any reason for me to fast. I no longer accepted God's silence. As I swallowed my ration of soup, I turned that act into a symbol of rebellion, of protest against Him. And I nibbled on my crust of bread. Deep inside me, I felt a great void opening.
explicacao: Citação de Ellie Wiesel sobre temas ligados a fe. “And then, there was no longer any reason for me to fast. I no longer accepted God's silence. As I…” articula fe, religion, spirituality em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e spirituality.
